brand.name: RESOURCES-ANALYZER PRO
brand.subtitle: La transparence contractuelle au service du peuple
brand.slogan: Chaque ressource naturelle appartient au peuple — chaque convention doit le prouver.
brand.author: Ahmed ELY Mustapha — Juriste, Expert en Finances Publiques
brand.domain: Legal SaaS, Natural Resources, Data Analytics

archetype: The High-End Legal/Data Console (Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Jewel & Luxury)

rules: Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for solemnity and academic rigor.
Data metrics, KPIs, and dashboard values must ALWAYS be rendered in JetBrains Mono.
Use explicit contrast checks. Never use pure #000000 or #808080.

layout_and_spacing.gap: gap-4 (tight for high information density like Bloomberg Terminal)
layout_and_spacing.border_radius: max 4px (rounded-sm) to maintain a solemn, rigorous legal feel.
layout_and_spacing.ui_surfaces: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Expose the skeleton for dashboards. Solid or Crystal Glass for headers. Sidebar left collapsible.

components_strategy.tables: Dense, compact rows. High information density. Text over icons.
components_strategy.charts: Shadcn/Recharts for KPI lines, Radar, Donut, Bar, Waterfall, Scatter, Heatmap. Ensure dense and scalable visualizations.
components_strategy.forms: Strict Shadcn forms with standard validations. Sharp edges.
components_strategy.buttons: Subtle hover states. Hover must be lighter hue. Never use bouncy animations. Use primary green or secondary gold for CTAs.
components_strategy.badges: Use alert/warning/equilibrium colors strictly for legal infractions, risks, and compliances.

motion_and_interactions.animations: Minimalist — micro-interactions for feedback only. No parallax or bouncy effects on dashboards.
motion_and_interactions.hover_states: Crisp background transitions, subtle shadow lifts (shadow-sm).
motion_and_interactions.accessibility: Always set focus states with clear outlines. Respect prefers-reduced-motion.

image_urls.description: Dark architectural background for landing page
Light architectural background for landing page
Professional law library for legal context or authentication pages
Natural resources mining blocks for dashboard or reports background

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly apply the specified color palette and fonts. Do not introduce extraneous colors.
Implement the UI using React, Tailwind CSS, and customized Shadcn primitives. Ensure sharp edges (max rounded-sm).
Dashboard components should be highly dense, utilizing JetBrains Mono for all numeric values.
Ensure all interactive elements have a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
Header must include a Dark/Light toggle and collapsible left sidebar via lucide-react icons.
Maintain the bandeau 'DOCUMENT PÉDAGOGIQUE' as non-maskable on legal pages.
